prediction.reasoning: Based on historical AAPL volatility (~25% annualized), 20-day prediction uses geometric Brownian motion assumptions. Point estimate reflects slight positive drift typical of equity markets. Confidence intervals widen with lower confidence levels to account for increasing uncertainty over 20-day horizon. Intervals assume log-normal distribution of returns with standard deviation scaled by square root of time.
